flags.label: Undergraduate enrollment
flags.summary: Undergraduate enrollment fell 41% at University of Puerto Rico-Carolina vs the 2003–2007 baseline (2.4k vs 4.0k).

flags.label: 150%-time completion
flags.summary: 150%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Carolina fell 23% between 2021 and 2024 (48.4% → 37.3%).

flags.label: 3-year cohort default rate
flags.summary: 3-year cohort default rate at University of Puerto Rico-Carolina fell 100% between 2021 and 2024 (3.8% → 0.0%).

flags.label: 100%-time completion
flags.summary: 100%-time completion at University of Puerto Rico-Carolina rose 10% between 2021 and 2024 (23.3% → 25.8%).
